title: Armor HUD Percentages
description: This project modifies the Armor Hud Numbers mod to display durability as percentages instead of numbers, making Uku's Armor HUD cleaner and easier to read.
body:
## 🔧 Also by me! go check it out.
- **[PingLess Attack Indicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/pingless-attack-indicator)** – Fixes the annoying attack cooldown sync bug and item bobbing up and down on high ping.

# Uku's Armor HUD — Durability Percentages

**Adds durability percentages to Uku's Armor HUD**, displaying clean and readable values above each armor slot.

> *Makes Uku's Armor HUD much easier to read at a glance while maintaining a clean, vanilla look and feel.*

---

## Credits

Most of the core logic and inspiration comes from **Armor Hud Numbers** by `NotRyken` *(W's for NotRyken btw)*

---

## Banners & Icons

If you have a banner and/or icon for this mod I'd appreciate it! Reach out on Discord: `YetAnotherFollowerOfChrist`

*Jesus loves you!! He can save you if you repent from your sins :)*
